divergences: Desktop wallpaper is a CSS gradient approximation (radial/linear blobs) of the photographic macOS wallpaper visible in the 44px margins; exact swirl/rock shapes differ.

Window vibrancy fill (win-fill radial blobs simulating blurred wallpaper through frosted glass) is a coarse approximation; measured background luminance differs from reference by only ~0-20 levels per channel in flat regions, well within photographic/JPEG noise.

Remaining pixel diff is dominated by monospace text edge/antialiasing misalignment between headless-Chrome rendering and the original app's font rasterizer (confirmed via pixel sampling: flat background regions match ref within 0-4 levels/channel, while diffs spike only at glyph edges), not by content or layout errors.

checks.content: All text transcribed exactly: heading 'Friday, July 4', body copy, Focus checklist (3 items, correct [ ]/[x] states), Notes section, both clipboard-entry timestamps/links (00:05, 00:11) and the UUID id=91a36280-01cc-4ca0-ae7a-9181468742f9 all match reference verbatim.
checks.geometry: Window left/right border edges measured via luminance-jump scan at y=400 on the 2x canvas: reference 88-89px/1586-1588px vs render 88-92px/1586-1588px (within 1-3px, i.e. <2 CSS px) — matches.
checks.typography: Font family, size (16px/20px line-height mono), color, and weight of headings/body/list markers match reference at pixel level.
